fire_rate.title: Fire Rate
fire_rate.description: Speeds up the whole firing line.

starting_soldiers.title: Starting Soldiers
starting_soldiers.description: Begin each run with more survivors already in formation.

barricade_hp.title: Barricade HP
barricade_hp.description: Raises the health of deployed barricades.

barricade_cooldown.title: Barricade Cooldown
barricade_cooldown.description: Cuts the downtime before the next barricade drop.

barricade_repair.title: Barricade Repair
barricade_repair.description: Improves how much repair rewards restore.

barricade_auto_repair.title: Auto Repair
barricade_auto_repair.description: Adds steady passive barricade repair from support soldiers.

coin_gain.title: Coin Gain
coin_gain.description: Banks more coins from every haul.

critical_chance.title: Critical Chance
critical_chance.description: Gives the squad more high-damage bursts.

loot_rarity_bonus.title: Loot Rarity Bonus
loot_rarity_bonus.description: Slightly improves the odds of rare route drops.

report_reward_bonus.title: Report Reward Bonus
report_reward_bonus.description: Adds a bonus to end-of-run banked coins.

hero_duration.title: Hero Duration
hero_duration.description: Keeps called-in heroes active for longer.

starting_barricade_tier.title: Starting Barricade
starting_barricade_tier.description: Changes the first barricade you deploy each run.

starting_support_role.title: Support Role
starting_support_role.description: Selects the support specialist who starts with the squad.
